positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized illustration of celestial flora intertwined with mystic fauna (e.g., glowing phoenix wings, crescent moon lilies). The style should be clean linework, reminiscent of Art Nouveau or Japanese woodblock prints, with strong negative space and crisp, saturated colors (deep indigo, gold, teal, cream). Central composition, suitable for a repeating seamless pattern or a single apparel graphic. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong graphical contrast, designed to look excellent as a screen print. Detailed line work, ink wash effect, vector quality, highly decorative, maximalist yet organized.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, cartoonish, photorealism, gradient fade, grayscale, distressed, dirty, sketch, pencil lines
